prompt: A polished vertical Japanese airline advertisement poster in anime style for JAPAN AIRLINES, with a bright aspirational travel mood. The scene shows a vivid blue sky with soft white cumulus clouds and strong sunlight with lens flare in the upper right. A large white commercial passenger jet with the airline logo on the tail and the words JAPAN AIRLINES on the fuselage flies diagonally upward from left to right across the upper half of the image. In the foreground, place 1 anime high school girl standing slightly right of center on an airport observation deck with glass railings and distant terminal structures behind her. She has a short silver-blonde bob haircut with side-swept bangs, a youthful stylish look, and a confident relaxed pose. She wears a school uniform consisting of exactly 6 visible fashion pieces: a dark gray blazer with neon green piping, a white button-up shirt, a red striped necktie, a black pleated skirt with green trim, a black shoulder bag with a small red airline-tag style patch, and black wrist accessories. She holds exactly 2 travel documents in one hand, a passport booklet and a boarding pass or ticket booklet in matching red-and-white airline branding. Use crisp commercial illustration rendering, clean linework, soft cel shading, and glossy poster-design composition. Add Japanese advertising typography and branding laid out like a real campaign: top left airline logo and “JAPAN AIRLINES”; large white handwritten-style headline text in the upper left reading 飛び出そう、ミライへ。; smaller white subheadline below it reading “いましかできない旅がある。”; a bold red promotional block on the left-center with “JALで行こう!” above a large boxed “学生割引”, a smaller red strip “国内線がおトク!”, and oversized discount text “最大20% OFF!” with small disclaimer lines beneath. On the right side, include exactly 3 white circular callout badges stacked vertically with red line icons and Japanese copy: 1 suitcase icon with “気軽に旅に出て、新しい自分に出会おう。”, 1 camera icon with “思い出をたくさんつくろう。”, and 1 group-of-people icon with “仲間との時間を、一生の宝物に。” At the bottom, add a full-width deep red footer banner with large handwritten-style white text reading 学生の今こそ、世界はもっと広がる。, plus a small airplane doodle and cloud doodles on the right. Below or within the footer area, add small white text “詳しくはJALホームページへ” and a simple search bar graphic containing JAL 学生割引. High contrast red, white, and sky blue color palette, premium youth-marketing campaign aesthetic, clean modern Japanese poster layout.
